description: A formal document that authorizes the project, defines its objectives, identifies key stakeholders, and outlines the roles and responsibilities of the project team. This Project Charter is specific to the establishment of a residential research unit for adult NREM parasomnias in Bonn, Germany.
steps_to_create: Define project goals and objectives based on the project plan.
Identify key stakeholders and their roles.
Outline project scope, deliverables, and success criteria.
Establish project governance and decision-making processes.
Obtain approval from relevant authorities (e.g., University Hospital Bonn, DFG).
Define high-level budget and resource allocation.

description: A comprehensive log of identified project risks, their potential impact, likelihood, and mitigation strategies. This Risk Register is tailored to the specific risks associated with establishing and operating the residential research unit, including regulatory, technical, financial, environmental, social, and operational risks.
steps_to_create: Identify potential risks based on project scope, assumptions, and constraints.
Assess the likelihood and impact of each risk.
Develop mitigation strategies for high-priority risks.
Assign responsibility for monitoring and managing each risk.
Regularly review and update the Risk Register throughout the project lifecycle.
approval_authorities: Principal Investigator, External Scientific Advisory Board

description: A detailed plan outlining how project information will be communicated to stakeholders, including frequency, channels, and responsible parties. This Communication Plan addresses the specific communication needs of the research team, University Hospital Bonn, DFG, study participants, and the local community.
steps_to_create: Identify key stakeholders and their communication needs.
Define communication channels and frequency.
Assign responsibility for delivering project updates.
Establish a process for managing and resolving communication issues.
Include a plan for community engagement and addressing potential concerns.

description: A plan outlining strategies for engaging and managing stakeholders throughout the project lifecycle. This Stakeholder Engagement Plan addresses the specific needs and expectations of the research team, University Hospital Bonn, DFG, study participants, the local community, and potential pharmaceutical partners.
steps_to_create: Identify key stakeholders and their level of influence and interest.
Develop strategies for engaging and managing each stakeholder group.
Establish a process for addressing stakeholder concerns and feedback.
Regularly review and update the Stakeholder Engagement Plan.

description: A plan outlining the process for managing changes to the project scope, schedule, or budget. This Change Management Plan addresses the specific challenges of a research project, including potential protocol modifications, equipment malfunctions, and regulatory changes.
steps_to_create: Establish a change control board and define its responsibilities.
Define the process for submitting and evaluating change requests.
Establish criteria for approving or rejecting change requests.
Communicate approved changes to stakeholders.
Update project documentation to reflect approved changes.
approval_authorities: Change Control Board (Principal Investigator, Data Engineer, Facility and Safety Manager)

description: A high-level overview of the project budget, including funding sources, expense categories, and key assumptions. This framework provides a basis for detailed financial planning and monitoring.
steps_to_create: Identify all potential funding sources (e.g., DFG, University Hospital Bonn, pharmaceutical partners).
Estimate total project costs based on the project scope and deliverables.
Allocate funding to major expense categories (e.g., personnel, equipment, facility, participant compensation).
Establish key budget assumptions and identify potential cost drivers.
Develop a process for tracking and reporting project expenses.
approval_authorities: Principal Investigator, University Hospital Bonn Finance Department

description: A template for structuring agreements with funding sources, including terms and conditions, payment schedules, and reporting requirements. This template ensures consistency and compliance across all funding agreements.
steps_to_create: Review existing funding agreements and identify common terms and conditions.
Develop a standardized template that addresses key legal and financial requirements.
Consult with legal counsel to ensure compliance with applicable laws and regulations.
Establish a process for reviewing and approving all funding agreements.
approval_authorities: University Hospital Bonn Legal Department, DFG (if applicable)

description: A high-level timeline outlining key project milestones and deadlines. This timeline provides a roadmap for project execution and helps track progress.
steps_to_create: Identify major project phases and deliverables.
Estimate the duration of each phase.
Establish key milestones and deadlines.
Identify critical path activities.
Develop a process for tracking and updating the project schedule.
approval_authorities: Principal Investigator, External Scientific Advisory Board

description: A framework for monitoring and evaluating project progress and impact. This framework defines key performance indicators (KPIs), data collection methods, and reporting requirements.
steps_to_create: Define project goals and objectives.
Identify key performance indicators (KPIs) for each objective.
Establish data collection methods and frequency.
Develop a reporting template for tracking progress against KPIs.
Establish a process for reviewing and evaluating project performance.
approval_authorities: Principal Investigator, External Scientific Advisory Board

document_name: Current State Assessment of Parasomnia Research
description: A report summarizing the current state of knowledge regarding NREM parasomnias, including prevalence, risk factors, diagnostic methods, and treatment options. This assessment provides a baseline for evaluating the impact of the research project.
responsible_role_type: Lead Sleep Medicine Physician / Principal Investigator
steps_to_create: Conduct a literature review of relevant research articles and clinical guidelines.
Analyze existing data on parasomnia prevalence and risk factors.
Consult with experts in the field of sleep medicine.
Summarize key findings and identify gaps in knowledge.

description: A framework outlining the operational procedures for the residential research unit, including participant recruitment, data collection, safety protocols, and data management. This framework ensures consistency and efficiency in unit operations.
steps_to_create: Develop detailed protocols for participant recruitment, screening, and enrollment.
Establish standardized data collection procedures.
Implement comprehensive safety protocols to protect participants.
Develop a data management plan to ensure data quality and security.
Establish procedures for managing emergencies and addressing participant concerns.
approval_authorities: Principal Investigator, External Scientific Advisory Board

description: A plan outlining the procedures for managing, storing, and sharing research data. This plan addresses data security, privacy, and compliance with GDPR regulations.
steps_to_create: Define data storage and backup procedures.
Implement data encryption and access controls.
Establish procedures for de-identifying and sharing data.
Develop a data breach response plan.
Ensure compliance with GDPR regulations.
approval_authorities: Principal Investigator, University Hospital Bonn Data Protection Officer

description: A detailed plan outlining strategies for recruiting and retaining study participants. This plan addresses potential barriers to participation and includes incentives to encourage enrollment and adherence.
steps_to_create: Identify target participant population.
Develop recruitment materials and outreach strategies.
Establish eligibility criteria.
Develop a consent process that addresses ethical considerations.
Implement retention strategies to minimize participant dropout.
approval_authorities: Principal Investigator, Ethics Committee of the University of Bonn

description: A detailed protocol outlining the process for reviewing and scoring polysomnography and sensor data. This protocol defines the roles and responsibilities of raters, the level of expert review, and the adjudication process for disagreements.
steps_to_create: Define scoring criteria for parasomnia events.
Establish a training program for raters.
Develop a process for resolving disagreements between raters.
Implement quality control measures to ensure data accuracy.
Define the roles and responsibilities of the night technician and independent raters.
approval_authorities: Principal Investigator, External Scientific Advisory Board

description: A detailed protocol outlining the safety measures and monitoring procedures in place to protect participants during residential data collection. This protocol defines the level of active monitoring, alarm systems, and response protocols.
steps_to_create: Identify potential safety risks.
Implement safety measures to mitigate identified risks.
Establish alarm systems and response protocols.
Train staff on safety procedures.
Regularly review and update the protocol.
approval_authorities: Principal Investigator, Ethics Committee of the University of Bonn

description: A detailed plan outlining strategies for engaging with the local community to address potential concerns and foster positive relationships. This plan includes regular meetings with neighborhood representatives, a dedicated communication channel for addressing concerns, and initiatives to minimize noise and privacy impacts.
steps_to_create: Identify key community stakeholders.
Establish a community advisory board.
Develop a communication plan to disseminate information about the project.
Establish a process for addressing community concerns.
Implement initiatives to minimize noise and privacy impacts.
